name: Percentage Calculator
desc: Percentage Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_description: Use our free percentage calculator to quickly estimate resultado, resto based on valor, porcentaje. No registration needed.
result_context: The result shows {result} is the portion representing the percentage, while resto ({resto}) is what remains after removing that percentage from the original value.
mistakes: Forgetting to divide percentage by 100 before multiplying
Confusing percentage of value with percentage increase/decrease
Not accounting for rounding when dealing with currency
